REPLY (SUPPLEMENTAL) DEC. OF SAM PATEL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VIKAS HOTEL, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF VIKAS HOTEL, L.L.C.'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO TERMS OF STIPULATED SETTLEMENT. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS PRESENTED AN APPRAISAL PREPARED BY AN INDEPENDENT THIRD PARTY FOR A LENDER BANK THAT REFLECTS A FAIR MARKET VALUE OF $2.6 MILLION BASED ON COMPARABLE SALES AND $2.525 MILLION BASED ON AN INCOME ANALYSIS. PLAINTIFF CHALLENGES ONLY THE LATTER FIGURE. BASED ON COMPARABLE SALES, THERE IS ADEQUATE SECURITY TO SECURE THE SETTLEMENT AMOUNT OF $312,500 BASED ON AN OBJECTIVE STANDARD APPLICABLE TO COMMERCIAL TRANSACTIONS UNDER MATTEI V HOPPER (1958) 51C 2D. 119. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
